Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

Interface RecordWritable

All Known Subinterfaces:
TokenWritable
All Known Implementing Classes:

JcsSerializerSession, Json5lSerializer, Json5lSerializerSession, Json5Serializer, Json5Serializer.Readable, Json5SerializerSession, JsonlSerializer, JsonlSerializerSession, JsonSchemaSerializer, JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable, JsonSchemaSerializerSession, JsonSerializer, JsonSerializer.Readable, JsonSerializerSession, MarkdownDocSerializer, MarkdownDocSerializerSession, MarkdownSerializer, MarkdownSerializerSession, MsgPackSerializer, MsgPackSerializer.Base64, MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex, MsgPackSerializerSession, OpenApiSerializer, OpenApiSerializerSession, ParquetSerializer, ParquetSerializerSession, PlainTextSerializer, PlainTextSerializerSession, SoapXmlSerializer, SoapXmlSerializerSession, SseSerializer, SseSerializerSession, TomlSerializer, TomlSerializerSession, UonSerializer, UonSerializer.Encoding, UonSerializer.Readable, UonSerializerSession, UrlEncodingSerializer, UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded, UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText, UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable, UrlEncodingSerializerSession, XmlDocSerializer, XmlDocSerializer.Ns, XmlDocSerializerSession, XmlSerializer, XmlSerializer.Ns, XmlSerializer.NsSq, XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable, XmlSerializer.Sq, XmlSerializer.SqReadable, XmlSerializerSession, YamlSerializer, YamlSerializer.Readable, YamlSerializerSession
public interface RecordWritable
Capability role for objects that can open a whole-value RecordWriter cursor.

The symmetric writer-side counterpart of RecordReadable. Implemented at both levels of the serializer surface:

  • the convenience Serializer subclass — a thin delegator that mirrors serialize(...) by forwarding to getSession().serializeRecords(output);
  • the SerializerSession subclass (where the live BeanSession/MarshallingContext is) — the real cursor creation.

Capability is detected via instanceof.

See Also:
  • TokenWritable — the structural-token extension (FULL formats).
  • RecordReadable — the symmetric reader role.
  • Serializers and Parsers

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    isRecordStreaming()
    Streaming-quality signal queryable before opening a cursor.
    RecordWriter
    serializeRecords(Object output)
    Opens a low-level RecordWriter cursor over the specified output.

  • Method Details

    • serializeRecords

      RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      Opens a low-level RecordWriter cursor over the specified output.

      When invoked on a convenience Serializer the cursor is opened with default session args (mirroring serialize(...)). Callers that need request-derived configuration should instead call createSession(args).build() and invoke this method on the resulting SerializerSession.

      Parameters:
      output - The output. Subtypes define the supported types (typically Writer / OutputStream / File / StringBuilder).
      Returns:
      A new RecordWriter cursor.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • isRecordStreaming

      default boolean isRecordStreaming()
      Streaming-quality signal queryable before opening a cursor.
      Returns:
      true if serializeRecords(Object) returns an O(1)-memory streaming cursor; false for buffered (whole-value) formats backed by RecordAdapter.
